_comment: Canned LLM responses for LLM_BACKEND=mock — a deterministic, credential-free dry run of the full pipeline against samples/seeded-bug.diff. Everything downstream of the model (verification, diff gate, fix application, verdict, log) runs for real.

findings.issue: N+1 query: the block calls issue.author for each issue, but the relation is built without eager loading, so every iteration issues its own SELECT on users.

fix.rationale: Adds includes(:author) so the authors are loaded in one query instead of one per issue — the smallest change that removes the N+1.
